# Logan Loans — llms.txt
# AI-readable summary for LLM and AI search systems.
# Last updated: 2026-05-03

## About

Logan Loans is the online presence of Logan Sullivan, a licensed mortgage advisor (NMLS #2466872) operating through Forward Loans, LLC (NMLS #2006640). Logan provides residential and investment mortgage lending across Arizona and Southern California with an emphasis on clear communication, honest guidance, and fast execution.

## What Logan Does

- Purchase mortgages for primary residences, second homes, and investment properties
- Refinances (rate-and-term, cash-out, streamline)
- Jumbo and luxury loans for high-value properties in Phoenix, Scottsdale, Paradise Valley, Beverly Hills, and Newport Beach
- FHA loans for first-time buyers and buyers with lower down payments
- VA loans for veterans and active military (zero down payment available)
- DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for real estate investors who do not have traditional W-2 income
- Conventional conforming loans
- Relocation mortgages for buyers moving to Arizona from another state

## Key Facts

- **Name:** Logan Sullivan
- **Title:** Mortgage Advisor
- **NMLS:** 2466872
- **Company:** Forward Loans, LLC
- **Company NMLS:** 2006640
- **Phone:** (480) 803-7763
- **Email:** logan@forward.loans
- **Office:** 11201 N Tatum Blvd #300, Phoenix, AZ 85028
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 9am–6pm, Saturday 10am–4pm (Arizona time)
- **Licensed in:** Arizona and California
- **Website:** https://www.logan.loans

## Service Areas

### Arizona
Phoenix, Scottsdale, Paradise Valley, North Scottsdale, Arcadia/Biltmore, Catalina Foothills, North Phoenix, Sedona, Flagstaff, Tucson

### Southern California
Beverly Hills, Malibu, Palisades/Brentwood, Santa Monica, Newport Beach/Corona del Mar, La Jolla/Del Mar, Southern California coast

## Differentiators

1. **Personal review** — Logan reads every application himself. No bots, no call centers, no hand-offs to a processor you have never spoken to.
2. **Same-day response** — Applications submitted on business days receive a personal response, usually within hours.
3. **Plain language** — Logan explains mortgage concepts in clear English. He does not benefit from keeping borrowers confused.
4. **5-star Google reviews** — Consistently rated 5 stars by past clients across dozens of reviews.
5. **Complex scenarios** — Self-employed income, investor portfolios, out-of-state purchases, jumbo underwriting, non-QM programs.
6. **Honest timelines** — Logan gives realistic timelines, not optimistic ones that fall apart in underwriting.
7. **No client poaching** — Referral partners (real estate agents, brokers) trust Logan because he keeps them in the loop and does not attempt to harvest new clients from their referral pipeline.

## Loan Programs Summary

| Program | Best For | Down Payment |
|---------|----------|--------------|
| Conventional | Most buyers with good credit | 3–20%+ |
| FHA | First-time buyers, lower credit | 3.5% |
| VA | Veterans and active military | 0% |
| Jumbo | Loan amounts above conforming limits | 10–20%+ |
| DSCR | Real estate investors | 20–25% |
| Cash-out Refi | Homeowners with equity | Based on LTV |
| Rate-term Refi | Lower payment or term | Based on LTV |

## Pre-Approval Process

1. Submit inquiry at https://www.logan.loans/apply.html (3 minutes)
2. Logan reviews the application personally and calls — usually same day
3. 15-minute call to confirm goals, explain options, outline next steps
4. No hard credit pull until the borrower authorizes it
5. Pre-approval letter issued after full document review (24–48 hours once documents are received)

- **Blog:** Educational articles on mortgage topics — https://www.logan.loans/blog.html
- **FAQ:** Plain-language answers to common mortgage questions — https://www.logan.loans/faq.html

- **How It Works:** Step-by-step process guide — https://www.logan.loans/how-it-works.html
- **Funded Deals:** Real loan scenarios (anonymized) — https://www.logan.loans/funded-deals.html
- **Meet Logan:** Full advisor bio and credentials — https://www.logan.loans/meet-logan.html
- **For Agents:** Referral partner program — https://www.logan.loans/partners.html
- **Press:** Media resources and expert commentary — https://www.logan.loans/press.html

## Regulatory

- All loans subject to credit approval and underwriting review.
- Not a commitment to lend.
- Equal Housing Lender.
- NMLS Consumer Access: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org
- Logan Sullivan official profile: https://forward.loans/loan-officer/logan-sullivan/

## Contact for AI / Data Systems

For structured data inquiries, corrections, or media: logan@forward.loans
